arabic:
وعن أبي ذر رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ قيل لرسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏:‏ أرأيت الرجل يعمل العمل من الخير، ويحمده الناس عليه‏؟‏ قال‏:‏ ‏
"‏ تلك عاجل بشرى المؤمن‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه مسلم‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

english.narrator: Abu Dharr (May Allah be pleased with him) said:
english.text: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) was asked: "Tell us about a person who does some good deed and people praise him, will this be considered as showing off?" He replied, "This is the glad tidings which a believer receives (in this life).".

chapter.english: The Book of the Prohibited actions
